productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Printed White Tshirt
description: Composition White T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, black stripe from the neck to the sleeves on the sides, brand name in red and yellow graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours below 40 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations What better way to show your support for the team than to slip into this stylish T-shirt from manchester united. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18& rdquo
